name: Kubernetes Readonly Diagnosis
description: Read-only AI Gateway tools for scoped Kubernetes workload diagnosis.

tools.name: k8s.pods.list
tools.description: List pods in a scoped namespace.

tools.name: k8s.pods.logs
tools.description: Read recent pod logs in a scoped namespace.

resources.name: soha://k8s/runtime
resources.description: Scoped Kubernetes runtime context for the selected cluster and namespace.

prompts.name: soha.k8s.diagnose_workload
prompts.description: Workload diagnosis prompt bounded to Gateway evidence.
